sanskrit:
प्रह्लादश्चास्मि दैत्यानां कालः कालयतामहम्।
मृगाणां च मृगेन्द्रोऽहं वैनतेयश्च पक्षिणाम्॥
transliteration: prahlādaś cāsmi daityānāṃ kālaḥ kālayatām aham / mṛgāṇāṃ ca mṛgendro ’haṃ vainateyaś ca pakṣiṇām //
literal_meaning: Among demons I am Prahlāda; among subduers I am time; among beasts I am the lion; among birds I am Garuḍa.
contextual_meaning: Even in lineages labeled 'bad' (demons), divinity can appear; time subdues all defenses; raw power (lion) and transcendent wings (Garuḍa) both carry the sacred.

shadow: Fear of being consumed by time

psychological_state: Reframing identity—no origin story disqualifies you from worth or spiritual greatness.
trigger_scenario: A client says, 'I come from a toxic family—can I ever be different?'
anchor_text: Divinity shines even in darkest lineages; time, lion, Garuḍa show sacred power.
